About & quick lookup

Short description about the lab goes here. Use the terminal to inspect news, papers, projects, people, and gallery data pulled from the JSON/BibTeX files.

News

Recent updates

Pulled from data/news.json.

Sep 9, 2024

Lab website scaffold ready

Baseline multi-page layout with ai-folio styling and data hooks is live.

Aug 19, 2024

First paper placeholders added

Numbered BibTeX files now render automatically on the papers page.

Jul 14, 2024

Team formed

1 PI, 1 Co-PI, and 1 student are set up in data/people.json.

© Your Lab Name — ready for GitHub Pages.
Hidden grants page lives at grants.html until you add it to the navigation.
